creator: steve@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Known problem which requires recompiling xterm and any other 
program that used the old utmp interface.  Since you are running 
-current this should just require a 'make world', the rebuild 
of xterm, xdm I think (if you use it), and a few others. 
Use the search engine on www.FreeBSD.ORG to look for old mailings 
concerning this topic.
